items.title: What the U.S. Blockade Means for Iran’s Economy
items.summary: Putting a stop to Iranian shipping will further add to Iran’s economic pain, analysts said, but it might not be enough to force concessions or lessen the global energy crunch.

items.title: Indonesia's capital of the future faces doubts in the present
items.summary: Indonesia is racing to build a new capital, promising a greener, futuristic city. But many citizens aren't convinced it will live up to the vision.
